attrs.fact: On 9:27 am on 7 February, 2022, Joanna submits a screenplay to a film festival.
attrs.quote: The screenplay I sent in to the film festival has been on my mind all day everyday.
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_3_D3:1; speaker=Joanna; listener=Nate; session_time=9:27 am on 7 February, 2022]
Hey Nate, long time no see! The screenplay I sent in to the film festival has been on my mind all day everyday. I keep bouncing between crazy emotions like relief, excitement and worry! Fingers crossed a producer or director falls in love with it and it ends up on the big screen - that would be awesome!

[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_3_D3:2; speaker=Nate; listener=Joanna; session_time=9:27 am on 7 February, 2022]

[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_3_D3:3; speaker=Joanna; listener=Nate; session_time=9:27 am on 7 February, 2022]
Thanks Nate, your support really means a lot. I put a lot of effort into it and I'm crossing my fingers. What about you? Anything new and exciting happening in your life?

[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_3_D3:4; speaker=Nate; listener=Joanna; session_time=9:27 am on 7 February, 2022]
Thanks, Joanna. Not much has changed for me, but I just discovered that I can make coconut milk icecream and gave it a try. It was actually pretty good, so I'm proud of myself.

attrs.fact: On 6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022, Joanna reflects on how writing has become an escape and a way to express her feelings, allowing her to put thoughts and feelings into something meaningful.
attrs.quote: Writing has become like an escape and a way to express my feelings. It gives me a chance to put all my thoughts and feelings down and make something good out of it.
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_18_D18:1; speaker=Joanna; listener=Nate; session_time=6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022]
Hey Nate, long time no talk! I've been busy with writing projects and really going all out with it. It's been the best thing ever - a mix of highs and lows - and my journal's pretty much my rock. Writing's such a huge part of me now.

[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_18_D18:2; speaker=Nate; listener=Joanna; session_time=6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022]
Hey Joanna! Great to hear it! It's amazing how much a certain activity can become a part of our lives. Keep it up, you're inspiring! Is writing your way to solace and creativity?

[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_18_D18:3; speaker=Joanna; listener=Nate; session_time=6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022]
Yeah, definitely. Writing has become like an escape and a way to express my feelings. It gives me a chance to put all my thoughts and feelings down and make something good out of it. Words just have a magical way of healing.

[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_18_D18:4; speaker=Nate; listener=Joanna; session_time=6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022]
That's really cool, I like it! It's incredible how words can turn something sad into something special. I'm glad it worked for you. Anything cool happening recently?

attrs.fact: On 10:58 am on 9 October, 2022, Nate asks Joanna for advice on making his living room comfy.
attrs.quote: Any pointers on what I should get for my living room to make it comfy like that?
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_23_D23:25; speaker=Nate; listener=Joanna; session_time=10:58 am on 9 October, 2022]
Any pointers on what I should get for my living room to make it comfy like that?

[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_23_D23:26; speaker=Joanna; listener=Nate; session_time=10:58 am on 9 October, 2022]
Sure! For one, you should get a couch that can sit multiple people so that you can lay down if you want, and make sure its really fluffy! Also invest in a blanket that has a little bit of weight to it, and some lights that can be dimmed.

attrs.fact: On 8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022, Joanna's screenplay was shown on the big screen for the first time.
attrs.quote: Another movie script that I contributed to was shown on the big screen last Sunday for the first time!
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_25_D25:1; speaker=Nate; listener=Joanna; session_time=8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022]
Hey Joanna, what's been up since we last chatted? How's it going?

[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_25_D25:2; speaker=Joanna; listener=Nate; session_time=8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022]
Hey Nate! Another movie script that I contributed to was shown on the big screen last Sunday for the first time! It was such a surreal experience to see everything come together. I felt a mix of emotions, but overall, it was a satisfying moment. I've been waiting for this for a long time!

[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_25_D25:3; speaker=Nate; listener=Joanna; session_time=8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022]
Congrats Joanna! How was it to finally see it on the big screen?

[shares a photo holding a videogame controller]

[turn_id=conv-42_conv_session_25_D25:4; speaker=Joanna; listener=Nate; session_time=8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022]
It was an amazing experience! I'll never forget seeing all of the characters and dialogue I wrote being acted out - it was such a cool feeling. Having all the hard work and determination I put into writing pay off was definitely rewarding. I know this is the third time it's happened, but its just so awesome!
